name: @jeswr/guarded-fetch
description: SSRF / DNS-rebinding-guarded fetch for the @jeswr Solid suite: a public-address-only IP classifier (RFC1918 / CGNAT / link-local incl. cloud-metadata / IPv4-mapped IPv6 / ULA / 6to4 / NAT64 embedded-v4 / TEST-NET), an https-only no-userinfo policy core with per-resolved-record rebinding re-check, a manual-redirect re-validation loop (cross-origin credential + body strip), a response-size cap + timeout, and an injectable-fetch seam. Browser-safe by default (no node: import); an opt-in ./node entry adds a full undici DNS-pinning fetch (closes the lookup->connect TOCTOU). Consolidated from the suite's three divergent copies. Experimental, AI-agent-generated.

scripts.lint: biome check src test scripts && npm run check:lockfile-transport
scripts.gate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:dist && npm run check:api && npm run publint && npm run attw

author: Jesse Wright <jwrightwho@gmail.com>
